title: Odd Lots: Why Cerebras Built The Largest Computer Chip (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的事情：为什么 Cerebras 制造了最大的计算机芯片（播客）
summary: Size is the name of the game for the AI chipmaker Cerebras: Their chips are truly massive, about the size of a dinner plate. According to Andrew Feldman, CEO and founder of Cerebras, that is about 58 times larger than the average chip. That sheer size enables blazing fast inference for AI queries. Feldman joins us on the week of his company’s IPO to talk about his core product and how it fits into the AI boom. We discuss the history of the GPU, competition between open-and closed-source models,

Frank Lee of HSBC analyzes Nvidia's results and forecast. Abigail Watt of UBS discusses the Fed minutes and the labor market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Says Its Enriched Uranium Should Not Be Sent Abroad, Reuters Reports
title_cn: 路透社报道，伊朗表示不应将其浓缩铀运往国外
summary: Iran's Supreme Leader says its enriched uranium must stay in the country, Reuters is reporting this morning. Those headlines sent oil prices higher. On Wednesday President Donald Trump said the US was in the "final stages" with Iranian diplomacy. Bloomberg's Annmarie Hordern reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Hits Session High on Report Iran Wants to Keep Its Uranium
title_cn: 有报道称伊朗希望保留其铀，油价触及盘中高点
summary: Oil gained after a report that Iran’s supreme leader issued a directive to keep near-weapons-grade uranium domestically, a key sticking point in peace negotiations with the US.

title_cn: 跟着我重复一遍，股票不是有效的通胀对冲工具
summary: Surveys indicate that investors are piling into stocks even as they see rising inflation. That’s likely to backfire as equities aren’t the hedge against price growth they are often taken to be.

title: Vietnam’s Convicted Mogul Repays $455 Million to Bondholders
title_cn: 越南被定罪的大亨向债券持有人偿还 4.55 亿美元
summary: Vietnam real estate tycoon Truong My Lan, convicted in the nation’s largest fraud case, has repaid a total of more than 12 trillion dong ($455 million) to about 42,000 bond holders as the government works to clawback billions of ill-gotten gains.

title: SpaceX IPO Could Be Just the Start of the Mega Listings
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股可能只是大型上市的开始
summary: OpenAI, Anthropic are gearing up for listings later this year.

summary: Stockholm’s blue-chip share index was disrupted by a technical glitch on Thursday, the second time in less than a month that Nasdaq Inc. has suffered problems with its Nordic benchmarks.

title: Junk Debt’s Red-Hot Rally Sparks Complacency Fears as Risk Rises
title_cn: 随着风险上升，垃圾债的炙手可热的反弹引发了自满情绪的担忧
summary: Junk debt is beating just about everything else in fixed-income markets after surging yields wiped out gains on most other bonds. Yet with high-yield credit spreads near two-decade lows, investor unease is building.

title: Iran War Spurs Extreme Bear Scenarios for Asia Currencies, Bonds
title_cn: 伊朗战争引发亚洲货币和债券极端熊市情景
summary: The Iran war is piling pressure on emerging Asian markets, pushing some currencies and bond yields toward levels once considered unlikely.

title: Goldman CEO Slides Into Musk’s DMs, Iran Reviews Trump’s Latest Offer | The Opening Trade 5/21/2026
title_cn: 高盛首席执行官深入了解马斯克的直接消息，伊朗审查特朗普的最新提议开盘交易 2026 年 5 月 21 日
summary:
Goldman Sachs campaigned to lead SpaceX's IPO, with Chief Executive Officer David Solomon messaging Elon Musk directly on X to highlight the bank's commitments.

A rebound in US equities stalled while oil moved higher and bond yields wavered as traders once again waited to see whether hopes of a peace deal in the Middle East would translate into tangible progress.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Euro-Zone Growth Is Buckling Under Weight of War Impact
title_cn: 欧元区经济增长因战争影响而下滑
summary: The euro area will slow markedly while suffering the fastest inflation since 2023 as it succumbs to the energy-cost surge from the Iran war, according to the European Commission.

title: SpaceX IPO Requires Leap of Faith in AI, Mars and Musk’s Vision
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股需要对人工智能、火星和马斯克愿景的信心飞跃
summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX pulled back the curtain on a business empire that has racked up ballooning losses and debt after acquiring a cash-hungry startup, and pumping billions of dollars into futuristic endeavors ranging from AI to a Mars rocket.

title: Quadria-Backed Aragen Life Said to Plan $300 Million India IPO
title_cn: Quadria 支持的 Aragen Life 据称计划在印度进行 3 亿美元的 IPO
summary: Aragen Life Sciences Ltd., a contract research and manufacturing firm, is considering an initial public offering in Mumbai that could raise as much as $300 million, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Codelco Fires Executive for Overstating Copper Output in Chile
title_cn: Codelco因夸大智利铜产量而解雇高管
summary: Codelco fired one executive and reprimanded several others after an internal audit found Chile’s state copper producer overstated part of its 2025 output by classifying material that needed further processing as finished product.

title: War Weighs on Global Growth With Inflation Worries Intensifying
title_cn: 战争拖累全球经济增长，通胀担忧加剧
summary: The global economy is showing signs of waning momentum and mounting inflation pressures during its third month of a war-induced energy crunch.

title: Indonesian Palm Oil Sinks as Commodity Overhaul Sows Confusion
title_cn: 大宗商品改革引发混乱，印尼棕榈油下跌
summary: Indonesian palm oil prices tumbled after President Prabowo Subianto unveiled plans to impose state control over exports of several key commodities, including the edible oil.

title: A Once-Empty Hotel Is Now a Hub for Dealmakers Rushing to Venezuela
title_cn: 曾经空荡荡的酒店现在成为涌入委内瑞拉的交易撮合者的中心
summary: For most of the 13 years the Cayena hotel has operated in Caracas, rooms starting at $400 a night mostly sat empty. The occupancy rate was a dismal 21% last year.

title: Microsoft’s Sliding Stock, AI Woes Make It Market’s Biggest Drag
title_cn: 微软股价下滑、人工智能困境成为市场最大拖累
summary: The S&P 500 Index has had a fitful 2026 as it aims for a fourth-straight year of double-digit percentage gains, something it hasn’t done since the 1990s, while contending with risks from the war in Iran and rising inflation.

title: Gold Steadies as Traders Weigh Prospects of US-Iran Peace Deal
title_cn: 交易员权衡美伊和平协议前景，金价持稳
summary: Gold traded in a narrow range as traders once again waited to see whether hopes of a peace deal in the Middle East would develop into something more concrete.

title: German Weapons Maker Rheinmetall Selling First Bond in 16 Years
title_cn: 德国武器制造商莱茵金属公司出售 16 年来第一笔债券
summary: Rheinmetall AG has begun selling €500 million ($580 million) of new debt in its first public bond offering since 2010.

title: Nvidia slips after earnings, SpaceX & OpenAI IPOs in focus | The Asia Trade 5/21/2026
title_cn: 英伟达股价下跌，因盈利、SpaceX 和 OpenAI IPO 成为焦点亚洲贸易 2026 年 5 月 21 日
summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Over 1,000 China Exporters Flag Yuan’s Gains in Earnings Reports
title_cn: 超过1,000家中国出口商在财报中提及人民币升值
summary: The yuan’s continued strength is exerting pressure on Chinese exporters on a scale rarely seen in recent years, complicating Beijing’s efforts to manage the pace of currency gains.

title: Manus Weighs Raising $1 Billion to Unwind Meta Takeover
title_cn: Manus 考虑筹集 10 亿美元以解除对 Meta 的收购
summary: The co-founders of Manus are exploring options to fulfill Beijing’s demand to unwind a controversial takeover by Meta Platforms Inc., including raising about $1 billion from external investors to buy back the Chinese-founded AI operation.

title: UK Regulator Demands Stronger Proof for Power Grid Upgrades
title_cn: 英国监管机构要求为电网升级提供更有力的证据
summary: The UK’s energy regulator unveiled stricter rules requiring grid operators to provide stronger evidence that network upgrades are genuinely needed before costs can be passed on to consumers.

title: Nvidia’s Huang Tries to Get Investors to See the Future of AI
title_cn: Nvidia 黄试图让投资者看到人工智能的未来
summary: The chipmaker’s CEO argues another big wave of AI demand is coming

title: Microsoft and EY to Spend $1 Billion to Help Clients Adopt AI
title_cn: 微软和安永将斥资 10 亿美元帮助客户采用人工智能
summary: Technology giant Microsoft Corp. and consulting firm EY are partnering to spend more than $1 billion to encourage their clients to launch major artificial intelligence projects.

title: EU to Seek Carve-Out for Banned China Chips to Shield Auto Firms
title_cn: 欧盟寻求排除被禁中国芯片以保护汽车公司
summary: The European Union will propose temporarily lifting sanctions on a Chinese semiconductor supplier after automakers warned of impending supply chain chaos if the ban isn’t removed.

title: Nvidia Tells Skeptical Investors AI Is Ready to Go Mainstream
title_cn: 英伟达告诉持怀疑态度的投资者人工智能已准备好成为主流
summary: Nvidia Corp., facing more investor skepticism, used its latest quarterly report to tout progress in diversifying the company, which aims to rely less on the giant data center operators that have fueled its runaway growth.

title: Taiwan Seeks to Detain Three in Nvidia Smuggling Crackdown
title_cn: 台湾寻求在英伟达走私打击行动中拘留三人
summary: Taiwanese officials are seeking to detain three individuals for forging documents in order to export Nvidia Corp. AI chips to China, the island democracy’s first such crackdown on semiconductor smuggling.

title: Ford Is the Latest Old Economy Company Caught Up in the AI Boom
title_cn: 福特是最新一家陷入人工智能热潮的旧经济公司
summary: AI is giving some old-school manufacturers a profit boost.

title: Circular AI Boom Goes Global as Asia Windfall Funds Hyperscalers
title_cn: 亚洲意外之财为超大规模企业提供资金，循环人工智能热潮走向全球
summary: The windfall earned by Asian chip makers is coursing through the world economy, mirroring on a global scale the circular flow of money within the AI ecosystem.

title: SpaceX IPO Filing: The Key Numbers
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股申请：关键数据
summary:
SpaceX filed publicly for what stands to be the largest-ever initial public offering, revealing billions in losses and a super-voting share plan allowing Elon Musk to keep the company under his control.
 
The rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence giant has reported a net loss of $4.28 billion on revenue of $4.69 billion for the first quarter. Some investors remain doubtful whether the sum of Musk’s aspirations for SpaceX are worth valuing at as much as $2 trillion.

Bloomberg's Charlie Wells discusses on "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bond Selloff Not Necessarily Bad for Equities: Citi's Manthey
title_cn: 花旗曼泰：债券抛售不一定对股市不利
summary: Beata Manthey, European equity strategy head at Citi, discusses the bond market selloff and says it is "not necessarily bad" for index-level equities. "EPS growth in Europe for the index-level is going up, not down," Manthey tells Bloomberg Television. "But it is happening in this very narrow fashion." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China’s Biotech Boom, AI Limits and Regulatory Edge
title_cn: 中国的生物技术繁荣、人工智能限制和监管优势
summary:
China’s healthcare and biotechnology sector is expanding rapidly, driven by scale, speed and a more efficient drug‑approval regime. This segment examines how artificial intelligence is helping cut early drug‑design costs, while leaving much of the expensive clinical and manufacturing process unchanged.
The discussion also looks at why China has become a global leader in clinical trials and biotech infrastructure, and how more realistic valuations are reshaping public markets in Hong Kong.
Simone Song, Founding Partner of Ori Capital, joined David Ingles from the sidelines of Sohn Hong Kong Investment Leaders Conference on Insight with Haslinda Amin to share her outlook on the sector and its risks.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BT Sees Revenue Declines as UK Competition Rises
title_cn: 随着英国竞争加剧，英国电信收入下降
summary: BT Group Plc forecast declining revenues for 2027 that missed analyst estimates, as Chief Executive Officer Allison Kirkby continues a turnaround plan to stem customer losses and fend off growing competition.

title: Morocco Backs Gaming Firms in Push to Spawn First ‘Unicorns’
title_cn: 摩洛哥支持游戏公司催生第一批“独角兽”
summary: Morocco will provide financial backing to local gaming startups, part of a state-sponsored push to generate more skilled jobs in the creative industries, diversify the economy and boost export revenue.

title: Samsung Chip Workers to Get Average $340,000 Bonus in AI Boom
title_cn: 人工智能热潮中，三星芯片工人平均获得 34 万美元奖金
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. will distribute about 40 trillion won ($26.6 billion) to chip employees as a bonus for this year after the company struck a last-minute deal with labor unions to avert a strike.

title: Starling’s Profit Dips as UK Fintech Looks to Move Past Restrictions
title_cn: 英国金融科技寻求突破限制，Starling 利润下降
summary: UK fintech Starling Group’s revenue dropped almost 6% in the year through March as it worked to offboard certain customers to come into regulatory compliance and invested more across its business.

title: Asia Tech Stocks Rally As Investors Return To AI Trade  | The China Show 5/21/2026
title_cn: 随着投资者重返人工智能交易，亚洲科技股上涨 |中国展 5/21/2026
summary: "Bloomberg: The China Show" is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Former Google Deepmind Researcher on New AI Startup
title_cn: 前谷歌 Deepmind 研究员谈新人工智能初创公司
summary: Andrew Dai, co-Founder & CEO of visual reasoning AI firm Elorian, discusses the progress of his new startup, including hiring and funding plans. He joins Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of the JPMorgan Global China Summit.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AMD Commits More Than $10 Billion to Taiwan AI Investments
title_cn: AMD 承诺向台湾人工智能投资超过 100 亿美元
summary: Advanced Micro Devices Inc., the leading challenger to Nvidia Corp. in AI computing chips, pledged to invest more than $10 billion in Taiwan to expand partnerships and add packaging capacity.

title: Nvidia Targets New Revenue Engine Beyond Hyperscalers
title_cn: 英伟达瞄准超大规模企业以外的新收入引擎
summary: Nvidia beat analysts’ estimates with its latest results and forecast, and used its latest quarterly report to tout progress in diversifying the company. Though investment in artificial intelligence has continued to surge from large data center clients, Nvidia predicted that a vast array of other businesses and governments would soon become a bigger source of revenue. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Norway’s Europe-Leading Stock Rally Goes Beyond Oil Heavyweights
title_cn: 挪威股市在欧洲领先，涨幅超越石油重量级股
summary: Norway is developed Europe’s best-performing stock market this year, thanks to surging energy prices. But there’s more attracting investors to Oslo than just oil and gas.

title: Dimon Says JPMorgan Will Hire More for AI, Fewer Bankers
title_cn: 戴蒙表示摩根大通将雇佣更多人工智能人才，减少银行员工数量
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Chief Executive Officer Jamie Dimon said the Wall Street giant will likely hire more artificial intelligence specialists and fewer traditional bankers as the adoption of the technology accelerates.

title: Singtel Shares Drop on Outlook, Seeks Clarity on M1 Deal
title_cn: 展望未来，新加坡电信股价下跌，寻求 M1 交易的明确性
summary: Singapore Telecommunications Ltd. shares fell after the company warned of a more cautious outlook and posted a decline in second-half earnings.

title: Samsung AI Bonus Spat Tests South Korea’s Labor-Friendly Leader
title_cn: 三星人工智能奖金争端考验韩国劳工友好型领导人
summary: President Lee Jae Myung came to power promising stronger labor protection and social cohesion, while vowing to transform South Korea into an AI powerhouse competing with the US and China. Now, those ambitions are starting to collide.

title: Samsung Reaches 11th-Hour Deal With Union to Avoid Strike
title_cn: 三星与工会达成避免罢工的 11 小时协议
summary: In a last-minute reversal, Samsung Electronics Co. reached a tentative deal with its labor union, averting a potentially crippling strike that had been scheduled to start Thursday at the world’s largest memory chipmaker.

title: Varde Partners Aims to Raise $1 Billion Asia Private Credit Fund
title_cn: Varde Partners 旨在筹集 10 亿美元的亚洲私人信贷基金
summary: Varde Partners is looking to launch a $1 billion private debt fund focused on Asia, according to people familiar with the matter, in what would be one of the largest such fundraisings in the region this year.

title: Trump Set to Sign AI Cybersecurity Directive as Soon as Thursday
title_cn: 特朗普最快将于周四签署人工智能网络安全指令
summary: President Donald Trump is poised to issue an executive order as soon as Thursday aimed at bolstering artificial intelligence cybersecurity and has asked tech industry leaders to join for the event, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Key Votes Loom on Iran War, Trump ‘Weaponization’ Fund
title_cn: 伊朗战争和特朗普“武器化”基金的关键投票迫在眉睫
summary: Several major issues show the growing unease among Republicans in Congress

title: Xi Plans Reported North Korea Summit After Hosting Trump, Putin
title_cn: 习近平计划在接待特朗普、普京后报告朝鲜峰会
summary: After hosting Donald Trump and Vladimir Putin in the span of a week, Xi Jinping may already be eyeing the next big move on his diplomatic calendar: a visit to North Korea.

title: Hungarian Budget Data Was ‘Falsified,’ Premier Magyar Warns
title_cn: 匈牙利总理马扎尔警告说，匈牙利预算数据“伪造”
summary: Hungary will probably have a very elevated budget shortfall this year, Prime Minister Peter Magyar said, accusing Viktor Orban’s administration of misrepresenting the data.

title: UK Net Migration Falls Below 200,000 as Visa Clampdown Bites
title_cn: 由于签证限制，英国净移民人数降至 20 万以下
summary: Net migration to the UK dropped by almost a half last year, underscoring a watershed shift in one of Britain’s most contentious political issues, but raising questions about the implications for the broader economy.

title: Iran Says the US’s Latest Proposal Has ‘Narrowed the Gaps’
title_cn: 伊朗称美国的最新提议“缩小了差距”
summary: Iran said the latest proposal from the US has partly bridged the gap between the warring sides, as they seek to turn a fragile ceasefire into a peace deal.

title: Australian Weapons Maker Eyes Growing Missile, Drone Demand
title_cn: 澳大利亚武器制造商关注不断增长的导弹和无人机需求
summary: Australia’s largest privately held weapons maker sees major opportunities in the nation’s military buildup, planning to expand artillery shell production, partner with drone makers and eventually build missile motors.

title: Iran’s Football Team Seeks World Cup Travel Visas for US, Canada
title_cn: 伊朗足球队为美国和加拿大寻求世界杯旅行签证
summary: Iran’s football team paused training in southern Turkey on Thursday to pursue travel visas for the US and Canada ahead of this summer’s FIFA World Cup, according to the state-run Anadolu Agency.

title: Mamdani’s Tax Plans May Hurt New York, Says JPMorgan’s Dimon
title_cn: 摩根大通戴蒙表示，马姆达尼的税收计划可能会损害纽约
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Chief Executive Jamie Dimon criticized plans by New York’s left-leaning mayor Zohran Mamdani to slap more taxes on the rich, arguing the move risks doing further damage to the city’s status as a business hub.

title: Space Force Missile Alert Satellites at Risk of Critical Defects
title_cn: 天军导弹警告卫星存在严重缺陷风险
summary: A new global satellite system to alert US forces of incoming missile attacks was one of the “lowest performing” Space Force programs last year and risks developing “mission-critical defects” after being launched into orbit, according to an unreleased service report.

title: Another Brazil Election Is Upended by Graft
title_cn: 巴西又一次选举因腐败而被颠覆
summary: Banco Master’s collapse has spotlighted its disgraced former chief’s ties to Brazil’s political elite.

title: Iran Is Reviewing Latest US Peace Proposal
title_cn: 伊朗正在审查美国最新的和平提案
summary: Iran is assessing the latest peace proposal from the US, as the countries seek to avoid a resumption of hostilities. The exchange of messages is based on Iran’s 14-point text from several weeks ago, Foreign Ministry Spokesman Esmail Baghaei said. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ukraine Starts Major Operation to Fend Off New Threat From North
title_cn: 乌克兰开始重大行动抵御来自北方的新威胁
summary: Ukraine has announced a major security buildup in the country’s north to deter Russia from launching another push toward Kyiv via the territory of neighboring Belarus.

title: Trump Dangles Taiwan Call That Could Derail US-China Ties
title_cn: 特朗普提出可能破坏美中关系的台湾呼吁
summary: US President Donald Trump again indicated he would speak directly with Taiwanese President Lai Ching-te, a move that would risk disrupting newly stabilized ties between the world’s two largest economies.

title: Trump Says US Is in 'Final Stages' With Iran
title_cn: 特朗普称美国与伊朗的关系正处于“最后阶段”
summary: President Donald Trump said the US was in the "final stages" with Iran, but also threatened to resume attacks in the coming days if the Islamic Republic didn’t agree to his terms. Meanwhile, President Masoud Pezeshkian insisted the country was not on the brink of giving in. Bloomberg's Paul Wallace reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Austrian Spy Found Guilty of Giving Secrets to Wirecard Fugitive
title_cn: 奥地利间谍因向 Wirecard 逃犯提供机密而被判有罪
summary: An ex-Austrian intelligence officer was found guilty of passing on state secrets to a fugitive former top executive at the fraudulent payments company Wirecard in a high-profile spy case that has prompted authorities in Vienna to tighten rules on espionage.

title: Nvidia Disappoints & SpaceX Files for Record IPO | Daybreak Europe 05/21/2026
title_cn: Nvidia 令人失望 & SpaceX 申请创纪录 IPO |欧洲黎明 05/21/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, stocks in Asia jumped as investors returned to the AI trade. Shares in the world's most valuable company slipped after Nvidia's sales forecast failed to meet the loftiest expectations. CEO Jensen Huang touted progress in diversifying the chipmaker, saying so-called physical AI will bring a colossal new opportunity.

After months of speculation, SpaceX has filed publicly for what would be the biggest-ever IPO. The documents reveal a net loss of $4.28 billion on revenue of $4.69 billion for the first quarter. There's also a super-voting share plan that would allow Elon Musk to keep the company under his control. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK's Reeves Set to Unveil 'Great British Summer Savings'
title_cn: 英国里夫斯将推出“英国夏季储蓄大优惠”
summary: UK Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves is set to announce a package of measures, dubbed "Great British Summer Savings," in an effort to ease cost-of-living pressures made worse by the Iran war. Bloomberg's James Woolcock reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Opens Greenland Consulate as Unease Grows Over Trump Push
title_cn: 随着特朗普推动的不安加剧，美国开设格陵兰领事馆
summary: The US is facing protests in Greenland’s capital as a new consulate opening fuels concerns over Washington’s designs for the island.

title: Philippines’ Justice Department Orders Arrest of ICC-Wanted Senator
title_cn: 菲律宾司法部下令逮捕国际刑事法院通缉的参议员
summary: The Philippines’ Department of Justice has ordered the arrest of Senator Ronald Dela Rosa, the missing lawmaker being sought by the International Criminal Court over allegations of crimes against humanity.

title: UK and Gulf States Hail Trade Deal After Four Years of Talks
title_cn: 英国和海湾国家经过四年的谈判后达成贸易协议
summary: The UK signed a long-awaited trade deal with the Gulf Cooperation Council on Thursday, deepening its ties with the oil-rich nations at a time of rising geopolitical tension and economic pressures.

title: Oil Near $100 Emerges as Consensus for Next Year With Iran War
title_cn: 伊朗战争导致明年油价接近 100 美元成为共识
summary: Oil market participants are increasingly pricing crude to be capped near $100 a barrel over the next year, as demand is forced to slow down to counter millions of barrels of supply losses caused by the US-Iran war.

title: Trump Renews Pressure as Iran Vows Retaliation Beyond Mideast
title_cn: 伊朗誓言在中东以外地区进行报复，特朗普再次施压
summary: The US and Iran traded threats of escalation as the weeks-long standoff in the Middle East dragged on without resolution.

title: German Government Pushes Associate EU Membership for Ukraine
title_cn: 德国政府推动乌克兰成为欧盟准成员
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz is pushing the European Union to consider associate membership for Ukraine as Berlin tries to inject life into the bloc’s enlargement process.

title: UK’s Iran Crisis Team Slashed as Part of Foreign Office Job Cuts
title_cn: 作为外交部裁员的一部分，英国伊朗危机小组被削减
summary: In the midst of two major wars, the UK’s Foreign Office is undertaking job cuts so severe that it’s about to halve the size of its team dealing with the fallout from the conflict with Iran.

title: Thai Princess Bajrakitiyabha’s Condition Worsens, Palace Says
title_cn: 泰国王室称巴吉拉吉蒂雅芭公主病情恶化
summary: Thai Princess Bajrakitiyabha Narendira Debyavati’s condition has deteriorated, indicating a “severe and uncontrolled infection affecting multiple vital organs,” according to a statement from the Bureau of the Royal Household.

title: Xi May Visit North Korea as Early as Next Week, Yonhap Says
title_cn: 韩联社称习近平最早可能下周访问朝鲜
summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping may visit North Korea as early as next week, Yonhap News reported citing government officials, as Beijing and Pyongyang move to strengthen longstanding ties.

title: El colapso de Banco Master altera la carrera presidencial entre Lula y Flávio Bolsonaro
title_cn: 马斯特银行的倒闭改变了卢拉和弗拉维奥·博尔索纳罗之间的总统竞选
summary: El escándalo de Banco Master sitúa nuevamente la corrupción entre las principales preocupaciones de los votantes, y sus repercusiones podrían ayudar a decidir quién se convertirá en el próximo líder de la mayor economía de América Latina.
